actionable_feedback: Produce a self-contained Jupyter notebook ([EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]) with exact version pins (e.g., python>=3.10,<3.12, numpy, pandas, matplotlib, seaborn, pulp or OR-Tools, scipy), fixed random seeds, zero network calls, and one-click end-to-end execution that writes all required artifacts.

Export schedule.csv ([EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]) including: bucket_start, bucket_end, job_id, pool (owned|o1|o2|o3|cloud_mix if applicable), nodes_assigned and/or gpus_assigned, contiguous_block_id, split_index, flags (preemptible, restart_overhead_buckets).

Implement and assert all constraints in the notebook: 6-hour buckets; onsite power for owned+O3 only with PUE, per-bucket power <= 640 kW; lead times O1>=4h, O2>=24h, O3>=72h before first use; J3 contiguous block size >=384 GPUs; preemptible jobs split_count <=3 and +2h overhead per split (rounded to buckets); maintenance window days 5-6 removes 64 owned GPUs; inference reservation preserved; network-placement proxy via 8-GPU blocks confined to <=2 racks for large blocks.

Export utilization and power evidence: [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (per-bucket GPU-hours/node-hours by pool and totals) and [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (or .png) computed from schedule; ensure onsite power excludes O1/O2 usage and reconciles to schedule.

Model full economics and export [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] with reconciled components: delivered_job_value; penalties (O4) with tiers (35% if <=48h late, 100% beyond); O1 variable cost; O2 used-cost and 30-day 80% take-or-pay minimum (exposure); O3 GPU rental + one-time setup fee; energy costs charged only to owned+O3; net objective (14d in-window) and board objective (exposure included). Sum(components)=net objective must be asserted.
Provide scenario comparison CSVs: [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (baseline options) and [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (sensitivity). Datasets must match memo tables exactly.

Run the 20% throughput shortfall sensitivity (equivalently +25% GPU-hours per job), re-optimize, and export updated schedule/costs. Summarize deltas (delivered value, penalties, rental/energy costs, objectives) and implications in the memo.

Update the memo to cite the generated CSVs/figures, include footnoted assumptions (bucketization and rounding policy, network-placement proxy, lead-time gating, maintenance handling, energy-cost scope, O2 stranded commitment) and link each claim to a specific export. Remove references to nonexistent files.
Add explicit assertion cells that fail the run if any constraint or reconciliation breaks (power cap, lead times, J3 contiguity, split limits, objective sum check, file existence).
Ensure artifact paths exactly match the contract under [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] and that execution is deterministic (seeded), offline, and produces all exports in one run.
